program: AMP4 Warehouse promise and inventory recovery program

scenarios.prompt: Open a product with enough visible available stock to cover open sales demand.
expected: AMP4 panel shows available-to-promise, on-hand, allocated, demand, inbound, and blocker metrics.
Promise summary explains why the SKU can be promised.
AssistantAuditEvent records the human-reviewed promise decision.

scenarios.prompt: Open a product with on-hold inventory and open demand.
expected: Panel identifies held stock as a blocker.
Recovery proposal instructs release only after QC/compliance approval.
Queue recovery proposal creates an AssistantActionQueueItem without changing inventory.

scenarios.prompt: Open a product with open WMS pick/putaway/replenishment tasks.
expected: Panel lists WMS task blockers with warehouse/bin/task evidence.
Recovery proposal recommends prioritizing the blocking WMS work.
No stock move or reservation is posted automatically.
Audit metadata confirms no silent inventory mutation.
